revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox | name = Iwanaga Faith | title = {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Faith|simple|Iwanaga-hime|ja|磐長姫命}} | titlestyle = background:#767C6B; color:#fff; | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Mount Fuji from Kumomi Sengen Shrine.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] | groupstyle = background:#8f9484; color:#fff; | group1 = Main | list1 = * {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|ja|磐長姫命}} * {{ill|Kumomi Shugendō|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kumomi Shugendō}} | group2 = Shrines | list2 = {{..."
I think ths is all shrines that even vaguely worship Iwanaga-hime now
Text replacement - "|大山祇神社}}" to "|大山祇神社|1=Ōyamazumi Shrine}}"
Text replacement - "Daishogun Shrine (Kita-ku, Kyoto)" to "Daishōgun Shrine (Kita-ku, Kyoto)"
Text replacement - "|御祖神社" to "|御祖神社|1=Adachi Myokengu|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu"
Text replacement - "|御祖神社" to "|御祖神社|1=Adachi Myokengu|2=ja|3=御祖神社|4=fr|5=Adachi Myokengu|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Adachiyama Myokengu"
Text replacement - "|大山祇神社 (西会津町)" to "|大山祇神社 (西会津町)|1=Oyamatsumi Shrine (Nishi Aizu)"
Text replacement - "|別宮大山祇神社" to "|別宮大山祇神社|1=Betsugu Oyamatsumi Shrine"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Text replacement - "|細石神社|" to "|細石神社|1=Sazareishi Shrine|"

Adding [[Category:qq]]<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->[[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: fix redirect [[Betsugu Oyamatsumi Shrine]] → [[Bekkyū Ōyamazumi Shrine]]
Bot: fix redirect [[Musashi Mitake Shrine]] → [[Musashi-Mitake Shrine]]
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Bot: remove deleted category Iwanaga Faith
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Text replacement - "Omuroyama Sengen Shrine" to "Ōmuroyama Sengen Shrine"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "<!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24221752933|time triggered pipeline]]
